description: Google Proximity Beacon API is a Google service for registering BLE beacons, managing beacon attachments, and monitoring beacon deployments. It is part of Google’s beacon/Nearby platform documentation and tooling.
summary: One HTTP API surface is documented for this domain: the Google Proximity Beacon API at `https://proximitybeacon.googleapis.com/`, authenticated primarily with Google OAuth 2.0 and possibly also API keys per generated client code.
